struggle in process the great lakes that is entitled
to the attention of thoughtful people in part of the
country The Lake Carriers association has declared for
open shop that u.s. it and it's members decline to deal
with any labor organization and insist that they shall
make their contracts for employment entirely with each
Individual employee.


Many ago there many vessels upon the great
lakes owned by single man group of men. The pro
of absorption and consolidation has progressed until
individual ownership has been almost obliterated. For
instance, subsidiary corporation of the United States
Steel corporation great fleet OF carrying
vessels Several of the large railroads have their
fleets; other combinations have been made So that
the part of the vessel owners individual ownership has
been almost eliminated and each fleet represents power
full organization But the vessel not content
with thus strengthening their side but all these powerful
separate organizations have been brought into single
organization known the Lake Carriers association This
association represents nearly the whole vesselowner
ship on the great lakes.


Yet this Lake Carriers association and its members
refuse to recognize any organization among their
poyes. Thus, while the vessel have gone
sodatng and combining until they have perfected all
powerful organization they will not permit their employees
even in separate groups (such engineers emen etc.
to have any organization unon but insist that they will
deal with each empoye separately.


The who tolls for wages is inevitably at great dis
advantage He rarely has much ahead if he is of work
he and his family must suffer for the necessities of life
On the other hand capital represents accumulation of
that which is not necessary for present existence 1t
wait ntrnscaly capital needs organization much less
than labor


On the other hand the Lake Carriers association
sens the of organization the part Of capital
denying to the employee who most needs organization the
right to organize at ALL


Can anything more unfair be imagined?


The term open shop is catching phrase and deludes
many. 1t really that those most entitled
organization denied it. and those least needing organic
alton permitted to carry it to the utmost extreme of
power.


If the Sherman anti trust law enforced as vgor-
ousy against captalistic organizations has been
recently against labor organizations, capitastc
organizations, such the Lake Carriers association
would cease to exist.
